dashboard.label: Ping Monitor Overview
dashboard.description: Enterprise network endpoint availability and latency monitoring - supports Events, Metrics, or Combined data sources

search.query: | inputlookup ping_monitor_settings_lookup | where _key="global" | head 1 | eval index=coalesce(index, "ping"), sourcetype=coalesce(sourcetype, "ping_monitor"), metrics_index=coalesce(metrics_index, "ping_metrics")
index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats count by group | fields group | sort group
index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats count by hostname | fields hostname | sort hostname
index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) | stats dc(target_ip) as total_endpoints

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) | stats sum(pings_successful) as success, sum(pings_sent) as total | eval availability=round((success/total)*100, 2) | fields availability

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) avg_latency_ms>0 | stats avg(avg_latency_ms) as avg_latency | eval avg_latency=round(avg_latency, 2)

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) | stats latest(packet_loss_pct) as packet_loss by hostname | where packet_loss > 0 | stats count as hosts_with_issues
| mstats count("ping.pings_sent") as count WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" $selected_groups_metrics$ $selected_hosts_metrics$ BY hostname | stats dc(hostname) as total_endpoints

| mstats sum("ping.pings_successful") as success, sum("ping.pings_sent") as total WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" $selected_groups_metrics$ $selected_hosts_metrics$ | eval availability=round((success/total)*100, 2) | fields availability
| mstats avg("ping.avg_latency_ms") as avg_latency WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" $selected_groups_metrics$ $selected_hosts_metrics$ | eval avg_latency=round(avg_latency, 2)

| mstats latest("ping.packet_loss_pct") as packet_loss WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" $selected_groups_metrics$ $selected_hosts_metrics$ BY hostname | where packet_loss > 0 | stats count as hosts_with_issues
index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) | timechart span=5m avg(eval(100-packet_loss_pct)) as availability by group

| mstats avg("ping.packet_loss_pct") as packet_loss WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" $selected_groups_metrics$ $selected_hosts_metrics$ BY group span=5m | eval availability=100-packet_loss | timechart span=5m values(availability) as availability by group

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) avg_latency_ms>0 | timechart span=5m avg(avg_latency_ms) as avg_latency, max(max_latency_ms) as max_latency, min(min_latency_ms) as min_latency

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) avg_latency_ms>0 | stats avg(avg_latency_ms) as avg_latency, max(max_latency_ms) as max_latency, min(min_latency_ms) as min_latency by hostname | sort -avg_latency | head 20

| mstats avg("ping.avg_latency_ms") as avg_latency, max("ping.max_latency_ms") as max_latency, min("ping.min_latency_ms") as min_latency WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" $selected_groups_metrics$ $selected_hosts_metrics$ span=5m

| mstats avg("ping.avg_latency_ms") as avg_latency, max("ping.max_latency_ms") as max_latency, min("ping.min_latency_ms") as min_latency WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" $selected_groups_metrics$ $selected_hosts_metrics$ BY hostname | sort -avg_latency | head 20
index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) | timechart span=5m avg(packet_loss_pct) as avg_packet_loss by hostname

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) | eval loss_bucket=case( packet_loss_pct==0, "0% (No Loss)", packet_loss_pct>0 AND packet_loss_pct<=25, "1-25%", packet_loss_pct>25 AND packet_loss_pct<=50, "26-50%", packet_loss_pct>50 AND packet_loss_pct<=75, "51-75%", packet_loss_pct>75 AND packet_loss_pct<100, "76-99%", packet_loss_pct==100, "100% (Total Loss)" ) | stats count by loss_bucket | sort loss_bucket
| mstats avg("ping.packet_loss_pct") as packet_loss WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" $selected_groups_metrics$ $selected_hosts_metrics$ BY hostname span=5m

| mstats avg("ping.packet_loss_pct") as packet_loss_pct WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" $selected_groups_metrics$ $selected_hosts_metrics$ BY hostname | eval loss_bucket=case( packet_loss_pct==0, "0% (No Loss)", packet_loss_pct>0 AND packet_loss_pct<=25, "1-25%", packet_loss_pct>25 AND packet_loss_pct<=50, "26-50%", packet_loss_pct>50 AND packet_loss_pct<=75, "51-75%", packet_loss_pct>75 AND packet_loss_pct<100, "76-99%", packet_loss_pct==100, "100% (Total Loss)" ) | stats count by loss_bucket | sort loss_bucket

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) | stats latest(_time) as last_check_epoch, latest(packet_loss_pct) as packet_loss, latest(avg_latency_ms) as avg_latency, latest(min_latency_ms) as min_latency, latest(max_latency_ms) as max_latency, latest(pings_successful) as last_success, latest(pings_sent) as last_sent, values(group) as group, values(description) as description, values(entitytype) as entitytype, values(device) as device, values(vendor) as vendor by hostname, target_ip | eval last_check=strftime(last_check_epoch, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval status=case( packet_loss==0, "Healthy", packet_loss>0 AND packet_loss<50, "Degraded", packet_loss>=50 AND packet_loss<100, "Critical", packet_loss==100, "Down" ) | eval status_icon=case( status=="Healthy", "✅", status=="Degraded", "⚠️", status=="Critical", "🔶", status=="Down", "❌" ) | eval display_status=status_icon." ".status | eval avg_latency=if(avg_latency>0, round(avg_latency, 2)." ms", "N/A") | eval min_latency=if(min_latency>0, round(min_latency, 2)." ms", "N/A") | eval max_latency=if(max_latency>0, round(max_latency, 2)." ms", "N/A") | eval packet_loss=packet_loss."%" | table display_status, hostname, target_ip, group, entitytype, device, vendor, description, packet_loss, avg_latency, min_latency, max_latency, last_check | rename display_status as Status | sort status

| mstats latest("ping.packet_loss_pct") as packet_loss, latest("ping.avg_latency_ms") as avg_latency, latest("ping.min_latency_ms") as min_latency, latest("ping.max_latency_ms") as max_latency, latest("ping.pings_successful") as last_success, latest("ping.pings_sent") as last_sent WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" $selected_groups_metrics$ $selected_hosts_metrics$ BY hostname, target_ip, group | eval last_check=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval status=case( packet_loss==0, "Healthy", packet_loss>0 AND packet_loss<50, "Degraded", packet_loss>=50 AND packet_loss<100, "Critical", packet_loss==100, "Down" ) | eval status_icon=case( status=="Healthy", "✅", status=="Degraded", "⚠️", status=="Critical", "🔶", status=="Down", "❌" ) | eval display_status=status_icon." ".status | eval avg_latency=if(avg_latency>0, round(avg_latency, 2)." ms", "N/A") | eval min_latency=if(min_latency>0, round(min_latency, 2)." ms", "N/A") | eval max_latency=if(max_latency>0, round(max_latency, 2)." ms", "N/A") | eval packet_loss=packet_loss."%" | table display_status, hostname, target_ip, group, packet_loss, avg_latency, min_latency, max_latency, last_check | rename display_status as Status | sort status

| mstats latest("ping.packet_loss_pct") as packet_loss, latest("ping.avg_latency_ms") as avg_latency WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" $selected_groups_metrics$ $selected_hosts_metrics$ BY hostname, group | eval status=case( packet_loss==0, "✅ Healthy", packet_loss>0 AND packet_loss<50, "⚠️ Degraded", packet_loss>=50 AND packet_loss<100, "🔶 Critical", packet_loss==100, "❌ Down" ) | eval avg_latency=round(avg_latency, 2) | table status, hostname, group, packet_loss, avg_latency | rename status as "Status (Metrics)", packet_loss as "Packet Loss %", avg_latency as "Latency (ms)" | sort hostname

panel.title: Recent Ping Events (Individual Pings - Events Only)

search.query: index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=ping ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) | eval status_icon=if(status=="success", "✅", "❌") | eval latency_display=if(latency_ms>0, latency_ms." ms", "N/A") | table timestamp, status_icon, hostname, target_ip, group, latency_display, ttl, error_message | rename status_icon as Status, latency_display as Latency, error_message as "Error Message" | sort -timestamp | head 100

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) | stats sum(pings_successful) as success, sum(pings_sent) as total by group | eval availability=round((success/total)*100, 2) | fields group, availability | sort -availability
index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) | stats dc(hostname) as host_count by group | sort -host_count

| mstats sum("ping.pings_successful") as success, sum("ping.pings_sent") as total WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" $selected_groups_metrics$ $selected_hosts_metrics$ BY group | eval availability=round((success/total)*100, 2) | fields group, availability | sort -availability

| mstats count("ping.pings_sent") as count WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" $selected_groups_metrics$ $selected_hosts_metrics$ BY hostname, group | stats dc(hostname) as host_count by group | sort -host_count

panel.title: Hosts with Recent Issues - Packet Loss > 0% (Events)

search.query: index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary packet_loss_pct>0 ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) | stats count as issue_count, avg(packet_loss_pct) as avg_loss, max(packet_loss_pct) as max_loss, latest(_time) as last_issue_epoch, values(group) as group by hostname, target_ip | eval last_issue=strftime(last_issue_epoch, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval avg_loss=round(avg_loss, 2)."%" | eval max_loss=max_loss."%" | sort -issue_count | table hostname, target_ip, group, issue_count, avg_loss, max_loss, last_issue | rename issue_count as "Issue Count", avg_loss as "Avg Loss", max_loss as "Max Loss", last_issue as "Last Issue"

panel.title: Hosts with Recent Issues - Packet Loss > 0% (Metrics)

search.query: | mstats count("ping.packet_loss_pct") as total_checks, avg("ping.packet_loss_pct") as avg_loss, max("ping.packet_loss_pct") as max_loss WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" $selected_groups_metrics$ $selected_hosts_metrics$ BY hostname, target_ip, group | where max_loss > 0 | eval last_issue=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval avg_loss=round(avg_loss, 2)."%" | eval max_loss=max_loss."%" | sort -total_checks | table hostname, target_ip, group, total_checks, avg_loss, max_loss, last_issue | rename total_checks as "Issue Count", avg_loss as "Avg Loss", max_loss as "Max Loss", last_issue as "Last Issue"
